title: Battle Studies
synopsis: You can't win through only with "friendship" and "youth." We stake our lives to get to the Koshien!! Kanou Shoutarou entered an official baseball club at one of the best powerhouse baseball schools in the country - DL Gakuen. However the discipline in the club, he admired so much, was beyond all imagination! From Nakibokuro—the former member of PL Gakuen's baseball club who played at the Koshien as the regular!

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

tags.name: Baseball
tags.description: Centers around the sport of baseball.

latestChapterTitle: No Man Better With No Outs

title: Fuuto Tantei
synopsis: In the ecologically-minded city of Fuuto, mysterious devices resembling USB flash drives called Gaia Memories are used by criminals and other interested parties to become monsters called Dopants, committing crimes with the police force powerless to stop them. To make matters worse, the Gaia Memories carry a dangerous toxin that cause their users to go insane to the point where they could die from the life-threatening devices. After the death of his boss, the self-proclaimed hard-boiled detective Shoutarou Hidari works with the mysterious Philip to investigate crimes which involve Dopants. Using their own Gaia Memories, Shoutarou and Philip use the Double Driver belts to transform and combine into Kamen Rider Double to fight the Dopant menace and keep Fuuto safe. (Source: Kamen Rider W Wiki) Note: Fuuto Tantei is a manga adaptation and sequel of the 2009 drama TV series Kamen Rider W .

title: Brenny-wa Binjari
synopsis: The story of a possessed person in a book who will not hesitate to kill for her goal. Brinny, who lived in obedience to her stepfather, thought it had nothing to do with her. Until she got involved in an incident with the sickly second prince, Lucian. At a moment of crisis, Brinny used her supernatural powers to save Lucian, and was relieved that everything was resolved when she saw that the possessed person, 'Aridna', was captured. However, for some reason, her beloved sister and the first prince died in a carriage accident, and even Lucian, who became her fiancé, began to act strangely. Wasn't the possessed person executed in the past? Is 'Aridna' still alive? Brinny decides to reclaim the empty space left by the disappearance of her precious people. She will fight the possessed person. (Source: Kakaopage, translated)

title: Chiisakute Kawaii Bungei-bu no Chitekina Senpai wo, Hiza no Ue ni Nosetara Mainichi Suwatte kuru You ni Natta
titleRomaji: Chiisakute Kawaii Bungei-bu no Chitekina Senpai wo, Hiza no Ue ni Nosetara Mainichi Suwatte kuru You ni Natta
titleNative: 小さくて可愛い文芸部の知的な先輩を、膝の上に乗せたら毎日座ってくるようになった
synonyms: After I Let The Small And Cute Intellectual Senior Of The Literature Club Sit On My Lap, She Started Sitting There Every Day
synopsis: One day, the Literature Club lends out its chairs to other clubs, leaving only a single chair behind. Shou and Yuzu are the only two left in the clubroom, and they end up in a lighthearted argument over who should sit in the remaining chair. Each wants the other to take the seat, and neither is willing to back down out of kindness. In the end, Yuzu gets her way, and Shou is forced to sit in the chair alone. Shou feels bad about being the only one sitting... until a sudden idea strikes him. “If I’m sitting in the chair, then I can become the chair and let Senpai Yuzu sit on my lap, right?” Or so he thinks.

title: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleEnglish: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleRomaji: Shiitagerareta Tsuihou Oujo wa, Tenseishita Densetsu no Majo Deshita
titleNative: 虐げられた追放王女は、転生した伝説の魔女でした
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

title: Mujin
synopsis: Lee Seon-Ho was falsely accused of parricide crime for murdering his own father. He lived through each day without being able to die. One day, Seon-Ho was approached by a mysterious old man and offered a desired deal that he could never refuse… (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Band wo Kubi ni Sareta Boku to Oshi JK no Seishun Rewrite
titleRomaji: Band wo Kubi ni Sareta Boku to Oshi JK no Seishun Rewrite
titleNative: バンドをクビにされた僕と推しJKの青春リライト
synopsis: Just before their major debut, 26-year-old Shibakusa Tooru is fired by his bandmates. In the midst of his despair, he learns that his former classmate and favorite artist, Narahara Shigure, has committed suicide. With nowhere to turn, Tooru jumps off the balcony to follow her...or so he thought, but he suddenly finds himself transported back in time to his high school days. In order to change his terrible future, he must start over with his favorite high school girl in this school youth revenge story! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: School for Wizards Old Enough to Learn Magic
titleEnglish: School for Wizards Old Enough to Learn Magic
synopsis: Roy Aveillam, the arrogant son of a notorious duke, is widely feared. But one heated clash with a rival classmate jolt something deep within –his memory of a past life returns, as does a burning desire: to master a craft and become someone extraordinary. Reincarnated at just eight years old, Roy awakens to the world's latent magic and vows to redefine himself –not just by his lineage, but by his will. (Source: Titan Manga)

title: Tensei Shite Arayurumono ni Sukarenagara Isekai de Suki na Koto wo Shite Ikite Iku

title: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleNative: 追放令嬢、クラフトしながらキャンピングカーで異世界を旅します
synonyms: The Exiled Lady Travels to Another World in a Camper Van While Crafting
synopsis: Riding in a camper, eating delicious food, and enjoying the spectacular view. Saori Furuki was a university student in the engineering department and loved making things. After a car accident, she is reborn as Eline, the daughter of a viscount, However, her family treats her coldly, saying that she is incompetent and can only use magic to produce items, and she is exiled from the country. However, Eline's “alchemy magic” is a magic that has unlimited possibilities when combined with the knowledge from her previous life! Determined to live freely from now on, Eline has created a camper for starters. She can move around, live, and make things as she pleases. Together with Aristy, a martial maid who adores Eline, she begins her adventurous journey with a sense of ease. Eating delicious food, admiring the spectacular scenery, and creating useful things. This is a travel story about riding in a camper and enjoying another world with elegance. (Source: SB Creative, translated)

title: The Temp Worker And The Career Woman
titleEnglish: The Temp Worker And The Career Woman
synopsis: Having given up on marriage, a 38-year-old career woman contemplates purchasing an apartment. She is filled with envy when one day a new, cute, 21-year-old temp worker is hired by her department. The career woman is taken aback by the temp's aggressive forwardness, and the two are pulled closer together in an unexpected twist. (Source: Taiyohtosho)

title: Kikkai-kun
synopsis: Maka Kikkai is an elementary school student who calls himself a handsome boy on the cutting edge of scientific civilization. He tries to live a comfortable and convenient life with the help of his tutor Mashin Hakase's, and his father's inventions, but he always fails and causes a big ruckus. Note: Chapter and volume count is based on the 1973 Sun Comics edition which was the first complete compilation of the series

title: Shogun
synopsis: The story starts with Ogata Shinsaku, a homeless 17-year-old boy who was disowned by his father and head of a major company, Tatsumi Takaaki. One day, an old man appears and gives Shinsaku 100 million yen, urging him to use it as he sees fit, so he starts his own company to fight against his father's business empire.

title: Open Car Girls
titleNative: オープンカー・ガールズ
synopsis: Otome Kito, a new college student, had vague dreams of “wanting to try something new.” Just then, a sleek, eye-catching car zooms past her, a crimson-red roadster! The driver is Yae Zensan, a car-lover. After being swept up by Yae's passionate appeal, Otome ended up purchasing a pure white Copen! With her new convertible, an exciting, vibrant college life is about to begin! (Source: Yanmaga, translated)

title: Countach
synopsis: The day after he finds himself dumped by his girlfriend, Sorayama Shun recieves a letter... from himself? The letter was from Shun 25 years ago for his future self. The letter reminds him of the time when he dreamed of owning a Countach and being a successful professional racer. With loads of luck and his ambition to make his childhood dream come true, he finds himself as a new owner of an LP400 Countach.

title: Koisuru Asteroid
synopsis: Astronomy and geology are fun…! Mira, who promised to “find an asteroid” with the boy she found at the campsite as a child. She tried to join the astronomy club, but from this year the “astronomy club” and the “geology research society” merged into the “earth sciences club”!? Let’s go search for the asteroid that we promised to look for that day. (Source: Manga Time Kirara Carat, translated)

title: Maid-sama!
synopsis: As if being student council president of a predominantly male high school isn’t hard enough, Misaki Ayuzawa has a major secret—she works at a maid café after school! How is she supposed to keep her image of being ultrasmart, strong and overachieving intact once school heartthrob Takumi Usui discovers her double life?! (Source: VIZ Media) Included one-shots: Volume 1 : Toumei na Sekai (A Transparent World) Volume 4 : Tsuide ni 3 Baka mo Maid-sama! (And While We're at It, the Idiot Trio as Maids!) Volume 4 : Soshite Momotaro mo Maid-sama (Peach Boy Is a Maid Too!) Volume 6 : Aoi Haru (Blue Spring) Volume 6 : Fukukaichou wa Ouji-sama!? (The Vice-President Is a Prince?!)
